events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario: residential job, Lockout/Tagout, observed field condition: group lockbox misused. Work rough-complete. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high/critical? Group lockbox misuse in LOTO can lead to unexpected energization, serious injury/fatality. Likely critical. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: group lockout box not used per procedure, keys not secured, multiple personal locks not applied, box accessible to unauthorized persons, tags missing, lockbox left open, keys removed from energy isolation devices and stored in shared unsecured box, no authorized employee verification. Actions: stop work, retrain, implement group LOTO procedure, each authorized employee apply personal lock to lockbox or hasp, secure keys, verify zero energy state, document. References: OSHA 1910.147(c)(4), (f)(3), (c)(7). Need include all fields. percent_complete maybe 80? rough-complete. value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty list. workable empty list. confidence 0.95. event_time 0.0 rate 0.0. Ensure valid JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Group lockbox is being used outside the employer's established energy control procedure",
    "Keys to isolated energy sources are stored in a shared lockbox without individual authorized-employee control",
    "Personal protective locks are not applied to the group lockbox by each affected authorized employee",
    "Lockbox is accessible or left in a condition that allows unauthorized removal of keys",
    "Required LOTO tags are missing, incomplete, or not attached to the lockbox/isolation points",
    "No visible verification that zero energy state was confirmed before group locks were removed"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately and secure the area",
    "Re-establish individual lockout/tagout for each authorized employee",
    "Implement proper group lockout procedure using a group lockbox with each worker's personal lock",
    "Ensure keys to energy isolation devices remain under exclusive control of the authorized employee",
    "Verify zero energy state and test for stored/residual energy before work resumes",
    "Retrain all personnel on OSHA 1910.147 group LOTO requirements"
  ],
  "rationale": "A group lockbox must be part of a written energy control procedure and provide each authorized employee with an individual lock securing the box. Misuse bypasses personal protective lockout control, creating risk of unexpected energization.",
  "references": ["OSHA 1910.147(c)(4) procedures", "OSHA 1910.147(f)(3) group lockout or tagout", "OSHA 1910.147(c)(7) training and communication"]
}
